changelog: Fix: Managed mode now sets internet_connect_always=1 — keeps a persistent server channel so tray capability restrictions (DONT_SHOW_SETTINGS, DONT_ALLOW_EXIT, etc.) remain enforced 24/7 instead of only during active backups
Fix: Managed mode now locks all client actions — disables allow_tray_exit, allow_pause, allow_starting_* alongside allow_config_paths and client_set_settings
Fix: Managed mode direct DB write uses DELETE+INSERT (not INSERT OR REPLACE) to avoid duplicate rows in settings table
Fix: Managed mode description updated to accurately reflect what server-side control can achieve
Fix: Cancel backup notification persists even after backup stops
